brandWorld.palette: pearl, chrome, black, pearl pink light accents
brandWorld.safety: Fictional original LUMINA members only. No real celebrity likenesses, readable logos, captions, product props, beauty claims, or copied choreography.

members.role: Use as the single visual anchor for the same five LUMINA members, stage wardrobe, pearl/chrome lights, reflective floor, and hook-stage blocking.
members.personality: Not a new character; preserve the visible group identity, set, wardrobe, and lighting continuity from this accepted frame.
